title: Blob IDs are SHA-256 content-addressed for transparent deduplication
description: handle_jmap_upload computes blob ID as SHA-256 of content. The store uses INSERT OR IGNORE so duplicate uploads of the same content return the same blobId without duplication. A contributor might suggest ULIDs or UUIDs for blob IDs to 'avoid hash collisions'. SHA-256 collisions are not a practical concern, and content-addressing gives free deduplication. Changing to random IDs would lose deduplication and require tombstoning. Keep content-addressing.
close_reason: decision recorded in beads for future contributor reference
